description: Style NoteShow off your season wardrobe with estelle's elegant neck pieces. You can style them with ethnic garb or blend it in with sugary pastels for a refined finish. These come with a matching set of earrings (so that's one less thing to shop for!) This set is just right to add a feel-good factor to your day-to-night ensemble. Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsGold chain with pearl-like beading and a lobster clasp with adjustable metal linksA wide oval pendant with brown, white and pink stones encrusted in it, has a mustard yellow centre stoneOval earrings encrusted with brown, white and pink stones encrusted in it, has a mustard yellow centre stoneHas a pearl drop with gold links dangling from the pearlHas a fish hook closureMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of earrings: 7.5 cmLength of chain: 40 cm
